title: 最優秀シニアウマ娘選出！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the end of the year approaches, I receive some
wonderful news.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
As representative for the panel of selectors, allow
me to humbly present this award!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on being selected for Best Senior
Year Umamusume, <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Your performance this year has been truly
outstanding! I believe your running has served as
an inspiration to countless others!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
To share in the excitement, I've also brought
along two individuals you know very well...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Umamusume Training Center
Academy's very own Director Akikawa and
Secretary Hayakawa!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope our appearance isn't an inconvenience.
Congratulations to both of you.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As someone deeply involved in the world of
Umamusume, I agree with this wonderful
selection! Wholeheartedly!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The way you two work together and soar to great
heights has touched the hearts of so many.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! I have no doubt you'll continue to be a
driving force in the world of Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I wish you both the best in your future endeavors!
Once again, bravo!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'll continue to support you from the sidelines too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the press conference ends on a high note,
<chrname> and I vow to achieve even
greater glory!
